Phone: +1 713 234 0863

Rheonics Sensor Electronics (SME-TR/TRD) Exploded View and Parts List

Modified on: Thu, 16 Jan, 2025 at 4:22 PM

What is the purpose of this article?
Show the parts that make up the electronics modules SME-TR and SME-TRD. This article should be consulted when referring to a specific part of the electronics assembly.

What products are involved?
SME-TR and SME-TRD (https://rheonics.com/electronics-and-communication/), electronics modules for Rheonics' sensors (https://rheonics.com/products/inline-viscometer-srv/)

SME-TR - Exploded view and parts list

The SME-TR is Rheonics' enclosed electronics module for field installations. This alternative securely stores the electronics module inside an IP66-compliant housing, protecting it from the environment.

Table 1: Parts list for SME-TR
ID | Description | Qty.
---|---|---
1 | SME-TRd Lid | 1
2 | Lid's O-Ring | 1
3 | Electronics Standoff | 4
4 | Electronics Module | 1
5 | In-housing Grounding Terminal | 1
6 | Lid Lock Screw | 1
7 | Cable Gland | 3
8 | SME-TR/TRD Housing | 1
9 | External Grounding Terminal | 1
10 | Rating and Specification Plate | 1

[Diagram of SME-TR Exploded View]

chunks.page_summary: This page provides an overview of the SME-TRD viscometer variant, detailing its features, listing its components, and referencing an exploded view drawing of its parts.
chunks.extracted_text:
The SME-TRD is similar in build to the SME-TR, however, this variant includes an onboard LCD screen that can display messages about the sensor and process status. Additionally, the screen displays viscosity, density, and temperature, with the option of configuring these to your desired unit of measurement. The TRD version also enables Bluetooth connectivity, which allows users to pair their devices with the Rheonics SensorView App (https://rheonics.com/rheonics-sensorview-app-launched-on-apple-store-and-google-play/).

Table 3: Parts list for SME-TRD

| ID | Description                      | Qty. |
|----|----------------------------------|------|
| 1  | SME-TRD Lid                      | 1    |
| 2  | SME-TRD Display                  | 1    |
| 3  | Display Standoff                 | 4    |
| 4  | Display Ribbon Cable             | 1    |
| 5  | Lid's O-Ring                     | 1    |
| 6  | Electronics Module               | 1    |
| 7  | In-housing Grounding Terminal    | 1    |
| 8  | Lid Lock Screw                   | 1    |
| 9  | Cable Gland                      | 3    |
| 10 | SME-TR/TRD Housing               | 1    |
| 11 | External Grounding Terminal      | 1    |
| 12 | Rating and Specification Plate   | 1    |

SME-TRD Parts List

key_facts: The SME-TRD is a variant of the SME-TR and includes an onboard LCD screen.
The LCD screen on the SME-TRD can display messages about the sensor and process status, including viscosity, density, and temperature.
Users can configure the displayed units of measurement on the SME-TRD.
The SME-TRD offers Bluetooth connectivity, allowing devices to be paired with the Rheonics SensorView App.
The Rheonics SensorView App is available on Apple Store and Google Play.
The document provides a detailed parts list for the SME-TRD, comprising 12 distinct components.
An exploded view drawing illustrates the assembly of the SME-TRD electronics module components.
Rheonics manufactures inline process density and viscosity monitoring equipment.
